posts.author: gustav.jacobsson (Gustav)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I would like to create a chart which shows the Contracted booking based on Project start (from “Estimated Project duration”) and this month and 3 months a head. Meaning that, if I look at the dashboard in June I will see 600 000 for June and 500 000 for July. Is this possible?

best regards
Gustav
